communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

from the Los Angeles Police Department regarding the missing persons
case of Jared Shadeed, who was last seen leaving an Airbnb on July 30 and whose car was found
abandoned in Los Angeles’ northeast area on August 17. I request the following files and will
accept any that are available to me.
- Full and complete case file regarding the missing persons case of Jared Shadeed
- Initial incident report - Any and all audio and video files related to the case
- Photographs or visual evidence related to the case
- Witness and family statements and interviews
- Field notes
I request a response time of five business days. If access will take longer, please provide an
estimated timeframe. As a member of the media pursuing this request for news-gathering
purposes in the public interest, I request a waiver of all fees. If fees cannot be waived, please
inform me if costs will exceed $250.
If you deny any portion, or all, of this request, please provide me with a written explanation of
the reason(s) for your denial, including a citation to each specific statutory exemption you feel
justifies the refusal to release the information and notify me of the appeal procedures available to
me under the law. If you conclude that portions of the records that I request are exempt from
disclosure, please release the remainder of such records for inspection and copying, redacting
only the portion or portions that you claim are exempt.
If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact me at char.adams@audiochuck.com
or (463)-220-3997. Thank you for your time.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Courteney Stuart

title: Freedom of Information Act Request: Colorado Springs Police Department

communications.subject: Colorado Open Records Act Request: Freedom of Information Act Request: Colorado Springs Police Department
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Colorado Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Any records, investigation materials, and final reports concerning or containing any reference to the Socialist Rifle Association between 2013 and March 25th, 2026.
Other terms which should be included in the request: "SRA" "Socialist Rifle Association LLC" "Socialist Rifle Association Inc."

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Socialist Rifle Association Security Team

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: CAM Detroit grievance complaints
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

-- All complaints, grievances, or reports submitted to HUD concerning the Detroit Continuum of Care, Coordinated Entry (CAM) and participating service providers in Detroit.
-- Any records of investigations, monitoring reviews, findings or enforcement actions related to those complaints.
-- Continuum of Care monitoring reports, risk assessments, or performance evaluations referencing complaint handling, client access to services and coordinated entry compliance.
-- Records of any Fair Housing or civil rights complaints referred to or handled by HUD involving Detroit’s coordinated entry system or affiliated providers.

Please limit the scope of these records from Jan. 1, 2022 to the present.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Aaron Mondry

communications.subject: Michigan Freedom of Information Act Request: CAM Detroit grievance reports
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Michigan Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Grievance complaints, investigations, findings, or enforcement actions involving homeless services providers participating in the Detroit Continuum of Care and/or Coordinated Assessment Model (CAM), from January 1, 2022 to present.

This request includes, but is not limited to:

-- Client grievance complaints involving shelters or emergency housing programs funded in whole or in part by MDHHS (including ESG-funded programs)
-- Investigation records, determinations, corrective action plans or compliance findings related to such complaints
-- Policies or guidance documents used by MDHHS to investigate or resolve grievances involving coordinated entry or shelter providers in Detroit

If any portion of these records is exempt from disclosure, please provide the non-exempt portions and cite the specific statutory exemption for each redaction.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Aaron Mondry
